_comment: Farming Simulator 25 dedicated server (Wine, headless) for Pterodactyl / Calagopus. You must own a separate FS25 server license and supply the installer + CD-key yourself; nothing copyrighted is downloaded by this egg.
name: Farming Simulator 25
author: janik@mielemeier.com
description: Headless FS25 dedicated server running under Wine. Upload the GIANTS installer, set your CD-key, and the server installs and starts itself. Management via the FS25 web portal (default port 7999).

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# FS25 install script: prepare the directory layout and drop in guidance.
# The heavy Wine install happens on first server boot (start.sh), because the
# game files are large and must be uploaded by the user (license restriction).
set -e
mkdir -p /mnt/server/installer /mnt/server/dlc

cat > /mnt/server/README-FIRST.txt <<'EOF'
Farming Simulator 25 - dedicated server
=======================================

1. Upload the GIANTS installer into  installer/
     - FarmingSimulator2025.exe  (or Setup.exe)
     - or the distribution image  FarmingSimulator25_*_ESD.img / .zip
2. (optional) Upload DLC installers into  dlc/  (FarmingSimulator25_*.exe)
3. Set the GAME_SERIAL variable in the panel to your FS25 CD-key.
4. Start the server. On first boot it installs silently, activates the key,
   installs DLCs, then launches. This first boot can take several minutes.
5. Manage the running game via the web portal on the WEB_PORT allocation.

The Steam version cannot be used as a server. You need a separate server license.
EOF

echo 'Done. Upload the installer into installer/ and set GAME_SERIAL, then start the server.'

variables.name: CD-Key / Serial
variables.description: Your FS25 server CD-key. Used once on first boot to generate the license files. Leave empty if you upload pre-activated *.dat files manually.

variables.name: Server name
variables.description: Name shown in the multiplayer server browser.

variables.name: Web portal username
variables.description: Login for the dedicated-server web management portal.

variables.name: Web portal password
variables.description: Password for the web management portal. Change this!

variables.name: Web portal port
variables.description: Internal port for the web portal. Must match a server allocation mapped to this port.

variables.name: In-game admin password
variables.description: Password to authenticate as admin from within the game.

variables.name: Game join password
variables.description: Password players must enter to join. Leave empty for an open server.

variables.name: Max players
variables.description: Maximum number of simultaneous players (game supports up to 16).

variables.name: Map ID
variables.description: Map to load, e.g. MapUS, MapFR, MapAlpine, or a mod map id.

variables.name: Pause if empty
variables.description: Pause behaviour when no players are connected (0 off, 2 default).
